sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_data XML);
SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_add_system_path('file://custom/') IN (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_add_system_path('file://custom/') IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM xml_test);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data IN (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2 HAVING COUNT(*) > 0);
SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_add_system_path(NULL) IN (SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE data_test (id INT, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO data_test (id, value) VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, 'B'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM data_test WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM data_test WHERE id = 1) AND id IN (SELECT id FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM data_test WHERE (xml_add_system_path('file:///tmp/') IN (SELECT value FROM data_test WHERE value IS NULL)) OR id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM data_test);
SELECT * FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data IN (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test GROUP BY xml_data HAVING COUNT(id) > 1);
SELECT id, CASE WHEN xml_add_system_path('file://invalid/') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS path_status FROM xml_test;
SELECT xml_data FROM (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id IN (1, 2) GROUP BY xml_data) AS derived WHERE xml_add_system_path('file://custom/') IN (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE xml_data IN (SELECT xml_data FROM data_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS filtered;
SELECT id FROM data_test WHERE (id IN (1, 2, 3) OR value IN (SELECT value FROM data_test WHERE value = 'B')) AND id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM data_test);
